mustPass: Scaffold must reflect sjötransport needs with service presentation and geographic or route coverage.
Home and contact routes must be present.
All default routes must have matching sectionsPerRoute entries.
Contact path must be Swedish and lowercase.
Recommended dossiers must only use allowed dossier ids.
All routes from routes.json are present.
No lorem ipsum or sample placeholder copy.
Generated code typechecks and the project builds.
avoid: Generic local-service structure without transport-specific route coverage.
Invented certifications, permits, vessel counts or destination claims.
Portfolio, menu, webshop or other routes unrelated to sjötransport.
Repeating identical CTA copy in every section without adding information.
